flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Coe College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coe College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.8k → $54.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Coe College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.8k → $54.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Coe College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (59.0% vs 64.5%).
